## Academic services

### Professional Service, Leadership & Editorial Activities

-   **Scientific Reviewer** for leading international journals, including *Journal of Dairy Science*, *Journal of Animal Science*, *Animal*, *Dairy Research*, *Theriogenology*, *Preventive Veterinary Medicine*, *Frontiers*, *PLOS ONE*, and *Computers and Electronics in Agriculture*, among others. *(Present)*

-   **Chair**, [*Dairy Cattle Milk Recording Working Group*](https://www.icar.org/index.php/technical-bodies/working-groups/dairy-cattle-milk-recording-working-group/), International Committee for Animal Recording (ICAR). *(2024 – Present)*

-   **Executive Committee Member**, [Cornell Institute for Digital Agriculture.](https://digitalagriculture.cornell.edu/) *(2025 – Present)*

-   **Faculty Fellow**, [Cornell Atkinson Center for Sustainability](https://fellows.atkinson.cornell.edu/). *(2024 – Present)*

-   **Faculty Fellow**, [Cornell Institute for Digital Agriculture](https://digitalagriculture.cornell.edu/). *(2024 – Present)*

-   **Organizer**, ADSA Discover Conference *“Milking the Data: Value-Driven Dairy Farming”*, Chicago, USA. *(2024)*

-   **Board Member**, Framework Development of the Master in Veterinary Medicine (v2022).\
    https://students.uu.nl/sites/default/files/dgk_raamplan_masteropleiding_diergeneeskunde_def.pdf\
    *(2019 – 2022)*

-   **Guest Editor**, Special Issue *“*[Towards Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence in the Farm-to-Fork Industry](https://www.mdpi.com/journal/applsci/special_issues/Artificial_Intelligence_Farm_Industry)*”*, *Applied Sciences* (MDPI). *(2022)*

-   **Applied Data Science Ambassador**, [Utrecht University](https://www.uu.nl/en/research/applied-data-science/about-us/ambassadors). *(2018 – 2023)*

-   **Open Science Fellow**, F[AIR Data and Software Track](https://www.uu.nl/en/research/open-science/tracks/fair-data-and-software), Utrecht University. *(2018 – 2023)*

-   **Co‑Organizer**, ADSA Discover Conference *“Big Data for Dairy”*, Chicago, USA. *(2016)*

### Professional membership

-   Member of the American Dairy Science Association.

-   Member of the Dutch Veterinary Association.

-   Member of the Flemish Veterinary Association.

## Extension services

National Institute for Agricultural Training (NCBL)

-   Multiple extension training sessions for dairy and beef herd managers on production, transition and reproductive management of dairy cows (2006-2022).

## Industry and Stakeholder Engagement

Active involvement in extension services for several Belgian, European and global agricultural businesses. Some examples but not limited to

### Feed Industry

-   [Agrifirm](https://www.agrifirm.nl)
-   [AVEVE](https://www.aveve.be)
-   [ForFarmers](https://www.forfarmers.nl)
-   [PAHC](https://www.pahc.com)
-   [Nutrivice](https://www.nutrivice.com)

### Milk Recording Organizations

-   [Lactanet](https://www.lactanet.ca)
-   [CRV](https://www.crv4all.nl)
-   [U.S. Council on Dairy Cattle Breeding (USCDCB)](https://www.uscdcb.com)

### Genetic Companies

-   [Dairy Herd Improvement Association (DHIA)](https://www.dhia.org)
-   [Semex](https://www.semex.com)
-   [Alta Genetics](https://www.altagenetics.com)

### Pharmaceuticals

-   [Zoetis](https://www.zoetis.com)
-   [MSD Animal Health](https://www.msd.com)
-   [Elanco](https://www.elanco.com)

### Dairy Cooperatives

-   [Alsafi Danone](https://alsafidanone.com)

### Precision Dairy Farming Technologies

-   [DeLaval](https://www.delaval.com)
-   [Lely](https://www.lely.com)
-   [Connecterra](https://www.connecterra.io)
-   [MmmooOgle](https://www.mmmooogle.com)
